state.name: New Hampshire
state.agency_full: New Hampshire Department of Environmental Services

documents.title: Hazardous Waste Cleanup Fund (RSA 147-B) — Overview
documents.description: Primary New Hampshire statute governing cleanup of hazardous waste sites. Establishes responsible party obligations, NHDES oversight authority, and the Hazardous Waste Cleanup Fund.

documents.title: NH Soil Cleanup Guidelines
documents.description: NHDES numeric soil cleanup criteria for residential and non-residential land uses. Used to evaluate site conditions and determine remediation objectives.

documents.title: NH MS4 General Permit (EPA-Administered)
documents.description: EPA-issued MS4 general permit for New Hampshire municipalities. NHDES serves as co-administrator. Requires Stormwater Management Plans and annual reporting.

documents.title: NH Stormwater Manual (2008)
documents.description: NHDES guidance document for post-construction stormwater management. Covers BMP selection, design sizing, and water quality standards for new development and redevelopment.

documents.title: NHDES Brownfields Program — Site Assessment Resources
documents.description: NHDES Brownfields Program resources for Phase I and Phase II ESAs, including AAI compliance, grant opportunities, and site assessment guidance for prospective purchasers.
